surfaces.title: Interactive approvals
surfaces.notes: Cursor hook ask behavior is not treated as a reliable security boundary; sir folds ask into deny with remediation text.

surfaces.title: File-read IFC labeling
surfaces.notes: beforeReadFile and preToolUse label sensitive reads before execution where Cursor emits those hooks.

surfaces.title: File-write pre-gating
surfaces.notes: Cursor's dedicated file-edit hook is after-action; sir relies on post-hook checks and posture sentinels unless Cursor also emits a generic preToolUse for that edit path.

surfaces.title: Shell classification
surfaces.notes: Bash commands are classified for egress, DNS, persistence, sudo, install, and dangerous-shell risk.

surfaces.title: MCP tool hooks
surfaces.notes: beforeMCPExecution/afterMCPExecution expose MCP arguments and responses when Cursor emits those hooks.

surfaces.title: Delegation gating
surfaces.notes: Delegation policy is enforced at Cursor's subagentStart hook.

surfaces.title: Terminal posture sweep
surfaces.notes: sessionEnd and stop provide final posture sweep coverage where Cursor emits them.
